release_notes: v0.9.2 — Startup is roughly two-thirds faster: found and fixed a regex performance bug in sentiment detection that had been silently getting worse as the response database grew. Every button in the app now has consistent styling (previously several Knowledge screens and dialog buttons rendered as plain unstyled boxes). Web Intelligence's competitor table now shows the on-page SEO data it actually collects (title, meta description, keywords, HTTPS/schema/sitemap, load time) instead of metrics it could never fill. Added a new Category tier to Prompt Sets in Knowledge — group related prompt families together and select a whole cluster with one checkbox on the Visibility page, without touching the underlying families or any historical data.
